steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The notes present a broad category claim and then back it with a specific example (Grenada's nutmeg, Andorra's cow). The student must find the choice that mirrors that structure: state a category of flag symbols and support it with a concrete example from the notes.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Grenada's flag...': Narrows to one country and makes unsupported claims about national importance. No category, no structural match. ✗
  • Choice B — 'vexillology...': Abandons the topic of symbols entirely to discuss the study of flags. Off-topic. ✗
  • Choice C — 'plant symbols... Grenada's nutmeg': States a category (plant symbols) and immediately supports it with Grenada's nutmeg from the notes. Matches the required structure. ✓
  • Choice D — broad category, no example: Announces a category but provides no supporting example. Incomplete. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
